components/accordion.title: Accordion
components/accordion.description: Expandable/collapsible sections. Click or press Enter to toggle. Supports single or multiple open sections.

components/box.title: Box
components/box.description: A styled container with optional border, padding, and background color. The fundamental layout building block.

components/button.title: Button
components/button.description: A clickable button with keyboard and mouse support. Responds to Enter when focused, or a configured hot key.

components/checkbox.title: Checkbox
components/checkbox.description: A toggle checkbox with label. Toggles on click or Enter key.

components/collapsible.title: Collapsible
components/collapsible.description: Toggleable container that shows either a collapsed or expanded view. When showCollapsed is true, both views are shown when expanded.

components/collapsible-text.title: CollapsibleText
components/collapsible-text.description: A text block that truncates to a single line when collapsed. Click to expand and show the full text.

components/digits.title: Digits
components/digits.description: Large block-character digits and letters. Renders text in a big figlet-style font using Unicode block characters.

components/drawer.title: Drawer
components/drawer.description: A slide-out panel from any edge (left, right, top, bottom). Contains a drawer view and a content view.

components/dropdown.title: Dropdown
components/dropdown.description: A dropdown selector that opens a modal picker. Supports single and multiple selection.

components/header.title: Header
components/header.description: Large text header with border decoration. Available as H1 through H6 in React.

components/hotkey.title: HotKey
components/hotkey.description: Registers a global keyboard shortcut. Wraps child content and triggers when the hot key is pressed.

components/input.title: Input
components/input.description: Text input field with cursor, selection, word movement (Alt+←→), clipboard support, and optional multiline/wrapping.

components/log.title: Log
components/log.description: Captures console.log / console.error / console.warn output and displays it in a scrollable view. Use with interceptConsoleLog().

components/progress.title: Progress
components/progress.description: A progress bar. Horizontal or vertical, with optional percentage display.

components/scrollable.title: Scrollable
components/scrollable.description: Wraps a single child view in a scrollable container with optional scrollbars. Supports mouse wheel and keyboard scrolling.

components/scrollable-list.title: ScrollableList
components/scrollable-list.description: Virtualized scrollable list. Only renders visible rows, making it efficient for large datasets.

components/separator.title: Separator
components/separator.description: A horizontal or vertical divider line.

components/slider.title: Slider
components/slider.description: A draggable range slider. Supports horizontal and vertical orientation with configurable min/max/step.

components/space.title: Space
components/space.description: Empty space filler. Use to add gaps or push content apart in a Stack.

components/spinner.title: Spinner
components/spinner.description: An animated loading spinner. Animates when isAnimating is true.

components/stack.title: Stack
components/stack.description: Arranges children vertically or horizontally. The primary layout component.

components/tabs.title: Tabs
components/tabs.description: Tabbed container with clickable tab headers. Switch between views.

components/text.title: Text
components/text.description: Renders styled text. Supports alignment, wrapping, and custom fonts.

components/toggle-group.title: ToggleGroup
components/toggle-group.description: A group of toggle buttons. Supports single or multiple selection, horizontal or vertical layout.

components/tree.title: Tree
components/tree.description: Expandable tree view. Renders hierarchical data with expand/collapse toggles and tree-line decorations.

components/window.title: Window
components/window.description: The root container. Fills the entire terminal. Typically the outermost element of your app, wrapped by run() or Screen.start().

core-api.title: Core API
core-api.description: The core API lets you build UIs by directly instantiating View objects. This is the foundation that React and Preact renderers build on.

getting-started.title: Getting Started
getting-started.description: Build fullscreen terminal applications with React JSX.

intro.title: Welcome
intro.description: A React-powered terminal UI framework for building beautiful fullscreen TUI applications.

preact.title: Preact
preact.description: TeaUI includes a Preact adapter as an alternative to React. Same component API, smaller runtime.

themes.title: Themes
themes.description: TeaUI uses a Style object for colors and text decoration, plus component-specific props for borders and layout.
